allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.host.neynar.app/v1/deploy -F files=@/tmp/clanker-tips.tar.gz -F projectName=clanker-tips -F framework=hono -F 'env={"SNAP_PUBLIC_BASE_URL":"https://clanker-tips.host.neynar.app"}' -F 'description=Initial deploy: clanker-tips snap v0.1')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d['version']\); print\('root:', d['ui']['root']\); print\('elements:', list\(d['ui']['elements'].keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d['project']; print\('url:', p['currentUrl']\); print\('version:', p.get\('currentVersion'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK — version:', d['version'], '| root:', d['ui']['root']\)")
